$comment: Glowforge brand design tokens. Color data is pixel-sampled from the official 'Glowforge Brand Identity Guidelines | Color' deck (the PDF's hex table was placeholder; swatches are authoritative). Typography, spacing, radius, and logo are marked needsConfirmation until the Type/Logo sections of the brand book are provided.

teal.note: Legacy hero color. Symbolizes the brand; used as the dominant identity color.

purple.note: High-energy contrast color; pairs strongly against teal/cream.

ink.note: Near-black for text and dark backgrounds.

colorSystem.pairingRule: Pick a color from one quadrant and pair it with a color diagonally across the spectrum to create a dynamic, contrasting two-color combination.
colorSystem.toneOnTone: Within one family, combine a tint or shade with the base (choose by background) for legible, low-key depth.
colorSystem.logoOnLight: On a light background, set the wordmark/type in a dark brand color (e.g. ink #12151A or a family shade).
colorSystem.logoOnDark: On a dark background, always set the wordmark/type in white (#FFFFFF).

typography.note: The Color deck uses a rounded geometric sans-serif. The actual brand typeface was not in the provided (Color) section. 'Inter' is set as a safe rendering fallback until the Type section / font files are provided.

logo.note: Logo file not yet provided. Wordmark color flips per colorSystem.logoOnLight / logoOnDark.
